0.text: TCD 002/2024 Ahmed Mohamed Eid Al Yahad Al Zaabi v Al Buhaira National Insurance Company

1.text: JULY 01, 2025 TECHNOLOGY AND CONSTRUCTION DIVISION - ORDERS

3.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

4.text: IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE

6.text: AHMED MOHAMED EID Al YAHAD AL ZAABI

11.text: ORDER OF H.E. JUSTICE ROGER STEWART KC

12.text: UPON the amended Case Management Order of H.E. Justice Roger Stewart KC dated on 29 April 2025

13.text: AND UPON the Defendant’s Application No. TCD-002-2024/2 dated 8 May 2025 seeking a document production order (the “Application”)

14.text: AND UPON reviewing the Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”)

16.text:
1. The Claimant is to produce documents as ordered by the Schedule to this Order by no later than   
4pm on Tuesday, 8 July 2025.

17.text: 2. The Claimant shall pay the costs of the Application in any event.
